title: helianthopsis matthewsii
intro: Helianthopsis matthewsii, also known as the African helianthopsis, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Apocynaceae, native to the tropical regions of Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, and its medicinal properties include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities, which can help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Helianthopsis matthewsii include the ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Helianthopsis matthewsii typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and stems, which can be used to make teas or applied topically as a poultice to relieve symptoms.
